attempts.hypothesis: The dedicated page is cannibalized: the HOMEPAGE ranks for 'jotform alternative' (pos ~34), not /jotform-alternative/ (which only ranks ~24 for 'free jotform alternative'). Consolidate the head term onto the dedicated page via exact-anchor internal links from related pages + a keyword-first title/H1, so Google picks the dedicated page and the term climbs. This is a cannibalization/consolidation test, NOT a thin-content test.

candidates.target_keyword: what is a data capture form

attempts.hypothesis: Homepage cannibalizes 'typeform alternative' (term ranks #4 but top_url is the homepage, not the dedicated page). Consolidate the term onto /typeform-alternative/ via an exact-brand homepage anchor ('Full Typeform comparison') plus canonical trailing-slash internal links (footer + blog), without adding content to the target. Expect top_url to flip to the dedicated page and the term to hold/improve. Upside is capped: term is already page-1.

candidates.target_keyword: free online quiz maker multiple choice

attempts.hypothesis: Two-part problem. (1) CANNIBALIZATION: 'feedback form template(s)' splits across 3 URLs; GSC top_url is /feedback-forms/ (LP titled '12 Best Feedback Form Templates') at pos 44-52 while the category page sits at 41 with 4,849 impressions. Neither page wins because both target the head term and neither linked to the other. Fix: category page becomes canonical owner (SERP page_type for this query is Listing_Collection: Canva/Jotform/SurveyMonkey/Adobe all rank with category galleries; DR-15 formuiz ranks #9). /feedback-forms/ retitled to '12 Feedback Form Examples & Best Practices' (it already ranks for feedback form design/examples) + exact-anchor links added both directions. (2) CONTENT DEPTH: category page had 1-line description + 7 cards (~460 words); added ~1,100 words via new category-overrides.json mechanism (types of feedback forms w/ template links, what to ask, how to create, 7 FAQs + FAQPage schema). Cluster: feedback form 1800/KD17, customer feedback form 700/KD11, feedback form template 600/KD6, feedback forms 450/KD14, employee feedback form 400/KD3, customer feedback form template 250/KD4.

baseline.target_kw_owned_by: https://youform.com/feedback-forms/ (GSC top_url, pos 52; category page also ranks)

attempts.implementation_notes: New source/_data/category-overrides.json + $applyCategoryOverrides in config.php (all 3 category types) + enrichment/FAQPage render in _layouts/category.blade.php. /feedback-forms/ title/H1/badge/hero retargeted to examples intent; gained links to category page (hero copy + Explore More buttons); category page links back via 'feedback form examples and best practices'.

attempts.hypothesis: Content-depth gap: page had ~350 words of enrichment vs 1,800-2,600 on every page ranking above it. SERP rewards 'what to include' checklists, sample questions, and industry-specific intake variants (Smartsheet #3 has 10 industry templates; monday #8 has 5 industry examples). A DR-0 PDF ranks #12 so authority is not the blocker. Added ~1,150 words matching those rewarded patterns + FAQPage schema + 2 contextual inlinks with exact anchors from /client-onboarding-forms/ (mentions intake 13x, previously zero links). Cluster targets: client intake form (1600/KD9), client intake form template (500/KD1), intake form template (800/KD4), new client intake form (300/KD7), client intake forms (250/KD3).

baseline.window: user-reported GSC avg position as of 2026-06-12

attempts.implementation_notes: New generic 'sections' override block added to config.php + _layouts/template.blade.php (reusable for all template pages). Content in source/_data/template-overrides.json. FAQPage JSON-LD emitted for any template with seo_faq (except CSAT hardcoded page).
